content.text: I need a way to extract specific private data fields from a collection of child objects and group them by type.
What happens if 'child.name' starts with 'x-' but doesn't match any supported keys in `self.supported_private_objects`?
The function uses a try/except block around the key lookup; if no match is found, it silently passes and excludes that specific child object from the final result.
Thanks for clarifying how the filtering works!
